hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,subprocess,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); [subprocess.run(['bash',v[0]['installPath']+'/scripts/inject-knowledge.sh']) for k,v in d['plugins'].items() if 'claude-echolog' in k and v]" 2>/dev/null || true

python3 -c "import json,subprocess,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); [subprocess.run(['bash',v[0]['installPath']+'/scripts/post-tool-prompt.sh']) for k,v in d['plugins'].items() if 'claude-echolog' in k and v]" 2>/dev/null || true

python3 -c "import json,subprocess,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); [subprocess.run(['bash',v[0]['installPath']+'/scripts/pre-compact-prompt.sh']) for k,v in d['plugins'].items() if 'claude-echolog' in k and v]" 2>/dev/null || true

python3 -c "import json,subprocess,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); [subprocess.run(['bash',v[0]['installPath']+'/scripts/inject-post-compact.sh']) for k,v in d['plugins'].items() if 'claude-echolog' in k and v]" 2>/dev/null || true

python3 -c "import json,subprocess,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); [subprocess.run(['bash',v[0]['installPath']+'/scripts/cleanup-session.sh']) for k,v in d['plugins'].items() if 'claude-echolog' in k and v]" 2>/dev/null || true
